titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in P75
P75
The New Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2000 and 2010.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. Further information about the transcription procedures followed may be found in the electronic edition of the majuscules at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Gap rest verse added at 11.45 by David Parker.
Ab tag moved to after witness end tag at 15.10 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 9.33 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
11.48 deleted, and gaps and uncertain spaces in 11.57 changed by Rachel Kevern.
[ειτε] changed to [ειπε] at 10.24 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 4.51 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
κα[] changed to κα[ι πυρι] at 1.33 by Rachel Kevern.
ηκου[3] changed back to ηκου[σαν] at 12.18 by Rachel Kevern.

[7] changed back to [εδυνατο] at 11.37, [3] changed back to [εις] at 11.38, [4] changed back to [υμιν] at 11.50, [5] changed back to [επροφ] at 11.51, [7] changed to [ημελλεν] at 11.51, ελεγ[2] changed back to ελεγ[ον] at 11.56, [6]νου changed back to [γινομε]νου at 13.2 and ισκαρι[4] changed back to ισκαρι[ωτης] at 13.2 by Rachel Kevern.
[οχλας] changed to [οχλος] at 7.20 and word breaks at 7.22, 7.26, 7.28 and 8.14 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
[γινομε]νου changed to [6]νου and ισκαρι[ωτου] changed to ισκαρι[4]at 13.2 by Rachel Kevern.
ηκου[σαν] changed to ηκου[3] at 12.18 by Rachel Kevern.

Two words over page break turned into one word at 11.33, [εδυνατο] changed to [7] at 11.37, [εις] changed to [3] at 11.38, μαρ[ιαμ] changed to μαρ[3] at 11.45, [ημιν] changed to [4] at 11.50, [επροφ] changed to [5] at 11.51, [εμελλεν] changed to [7] at 11.51 and ελεγ[ον] changed to ελεγ[2] at 11.56 by Rachel Kevern.
μαρ[θαν] changed to μαρ[3] at 11.5 by David Parker.
Word break in 1.4 changed by David Parker.
Typo in 14.31 corrected by David Parker.
Word breaks in 7.45, 8.43, corrected by David Parker.
Word break in 12.3 corrected by David Parker.
Word break at 6.68, tagging at 6.19 and 14.28 corrected by David Parker.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0 with manual adjustments.

ab.note: There are traces of ink which cannot be aligned with any particular characters in the reconstruction
There is something at the end of this line that might be a trace of a mu but looks too high
There are traces of ink on this line representing parts of some letters but their identification is not secure.
There is a missing folio after this page, 14.8 begins on F63v
